citations.quote:
Tenancy Agreement
BETWEEN
The Court of Edinburgh Napier University, PER
Edinburgh Napier University
Property & Facilities
Student

RE: Accommodation arrears

From Donnelly, Kathleen <K.Donnelly@napier.ac.uk>
     on behalf of
     fees <fees@napier.a

Accommodation Hardship Fund - payment date

From Edinburgh Napier University <findafund@napier.ac.uk>
Date Wed 26/11/20

Re: Flat Transfer

From Elbushra, Anfal <40805511@live.napier.ac.uk>
Date Wed 11/03/2026 15:10
To   Srebrzynska, Nika <

Castlelaw Flat 5 - Mould issue

From Escribano, Julieta <J.Escribano@napier.ac.uk>
Date Fri 20/03/2026 16:50

Damp issues - update

From Escribano, Julieta <J.Escribano@napier.ac.uk>
Date Thu 23/04/2026 14:55

findings.text: Tenancy agreement for 2025-26 between Edinburgh Napier University and Anfal Elbushra exists.
Accommodation arrears correspondence sent by fees department (Kathleen Donnelly) to Anfal Elbushra.
Accommodation Hardship Fund payment date email sent 26 Nov 2025.
Flat transfer requested 11 Mar 2026; mould issue reported 20 Mar 2026; damp update 23 Apr 2026.

proposed_artifacts.title: Expanded Chronology Events

proposed_tasks.instructions: Extract precise dates, amounts, and outcomes from the full text of sources NAP-SRC-0018 (tenancy agreement), NAP-SRC-0049 (arrears), NAP-SRC-0022 (hardship fund), NAP-SRC-0055 (urgent support request), and NAP-SRC-0012 (bank statement). Update chronology with exact values.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract precise dates and amounts from key sources

redaction_flags.text: Source NAP-SRC-0001 contains SAAS correspondence with personal data (name, address).
Source NAP-SRC-0012 contains bank statement with financial transactions.
Source NAP-SRC-0002 contains coursework extension request with personal details.

risk_flags.text: Arrears correspondence may indicate potential eviction or debt recovery action.
Mould and damp issues could affect habitability and tenant rights.
Flat transfer request suggests possible dissatisfaction or need for alternative accommodation.

summary: Extracted key chronology events from 62 source materials for matter napier-accommodation-arrears. Identified tenancy start (Sep 2025), arrears correspondence (Apr 2026), hardship fund application (Nov 2025), flat transfer request (Mar 2026), and mould/damp issues (Mar-Apr 2026). Proposed follow-up task to extract precise dates and amounts from full source text.

uncertainties.text: Exact arrears amount and due dates not extractable from source_material excerpts alone.
Hardship fund payment amount and outcome not specified in excerpt.
Full tenancy start and end dates not confirmed from excerpt; need full text of NAP-SRC-0018.
